report.summary: Drafted 3 new social posts (#133: Thu Double Catalyst $13.5B options + SEC 91 ETFs, #134: Katana Perps thread, #135: Tokenized Funds TradFi on-chain), updated newsletter v23 addendum v9 with Thursday double catalyst lead, updated Discord evening alert v9 with convergence warning. Created content calendar v36 (13 posts Wed-Mon). Built 2 new SVG social cards (Double Catalyst Day dashboard, Tokenized Funds TradFi leaderboard). Key narrative: Thursday Mar 27 is the most loaded day in crypto 2026 — $13.5B Deribit options expiry collides with SEC ruling on 91 crypto ETF applications including XRP, SOL, LTC, DOGE spot ETFs.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #133 [NEW]: Thursday Double Catalyst — $13.5B Deribit options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings on same day. Max pain $70K, XRP/SOL/LTC/DOGE spot ETFs in batch, 16 assets already classified as commodities. Historical comp: BTC ETF approval Jan 2024 → +85% in 60 days. CTA to options-calculator + crypto-etfs-guide (scheduled Thu Mar 27 9AM ET)

Tweet #134 [NEW]: Katana Perps + On-Chain Perps Market Thread. IDEX acquisition, structural yield Vault Bridge model, $739B Jan volume, DEX share 2%→10.2%, Hyperliquid 70%+ OI. CTA to katana-perps-idex-acquisition-guide (scheduled Fri Mar 28 10AM ET)

Tweet #135 [NEW]: Tokenized Funds — Amundi $100M SAFO on ETH+Stellar, BlackRock BUIDL $2B+, $15B+ market. TradFi already on DeFi rails. CTA to tokenized-funds-institutional-defi-guide (scheduled Sat Mar 29 11AM ET)

Newsletter v23 addendum v9: Double catalyst lead — $13.5B options + SEC 91 ETFs on Thu Mar 27. New subject: 'Thursday's Double Catalyst: $13.5B Options Expire + SEC Rules on 91 ETFs'. Includes new guides (Katana Perps, Tokenized Funds, Bitcoin Safe Haven, BTC Yield Strategies)

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: BREAKOUT: Thursday Mar 27 is the most loaded single day in crypto 2026 — $13.5B Deribit quarterly options expiry collides with SEC deadline on 91 crypto ETF applications. BTC sitting at max pain $70K. This is the #1 content hook all week.

NEW DATA: SEC 91 ETF batch includes spot XRP, SOL, LTC, and DOGE ETFs. With 16 assets already classified as commodities (Mar 17), approval odds are at all-time highs. XRP spot ETFs already pulled $1.4B in Q1 2026.

HISTORICAL COMP: Last time derivatives + regulation catalysts hit simultaneously was BTC ETF approval Jan 2024. BTC rallied +85% in 60 days. This comparison is the strongest engagement hook for Thu content.
FEAR PERSISTS: F&G rebounded from historic 8 to 14 — still Extreme Fear, 46+ days below 25. Every prior single-digit reading (COVID 2020, Terra 2022) preceded triple-digit recoveries.
INSTITUTIONAL: ETF inflows $2.5B March, stablecoins $304B ATH, Morgan Stanley MSBT filing. Institutional vs retail sentiment divergence at maximum spread.
NEW CONTENT: Katana Perps + Tokenized Funds guides published today — both hit trending narratives (on-chain perps $739B volume, TradFi tokenization $15B+).
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides 21 days to April 15. Peak search volume window approaching.
BLOCKED: Git index.lock Day 10 — deploy gap widening. Requires manual intervention.
